sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89925" key="prospela/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσπελ-άτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n89925.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πελάτης</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0566.tlg001:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope> </bibl>(<tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">b</tr_>).</sense> </entryFree>
